summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Elzoha landing page. All major sections render correctly with proper content and interactions.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attributes missing on navbar-logo, navbar-join-waitlist, navbar-book-demo buttons
Close (X) button lacks a standard selector (no data-testid, no aria-label). Escapé key works. Visual X is present but hard to select programmatically.
Copyright text not found with pattern '/2025.*Elzoha/' - minor text format difference

issues: CTA section Join Waitlist and Book Demo buttons are present but not visible in screenshot - section may need more vertical scroll margin

action_items: Add aria-label='Close' or data-testid='modal-close' to WaitlistModal close button
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid attributes on key navbar interactive elements (logo, CTA buttons)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend landing page. All major sections tested and working: Hero, Navbar (nav links scroll to correct sections), Social Proof (4 badges), Problem (visible pain points), Solution (bento grid visible), Workflow (5 steps), Pricing (3 tiers with correct prices ₹999/₹2,999/Custom + Most Popular badge on Growth), FAQ (6 accordion items expand on click), Footer (links visible). Waitlist modal opens on Join Waitlist click, form has all 5 fields, closes via Escape key. Mobile responsive at 375px. Minor: data-testid missing on some navbar elements, modal close button needs aria-label.
